title: 8 Things a Man Becomes When He Chases God First
caption:
Chasing a wife makes you needy. Chasing God makes you ready, and you don't even notice the difference until somebody else does.

Seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you. (Matthew 6:33)

Here's what actually changes in a man who gets the order right.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #singlemen #scripture
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
